name: sync registries: /pr-source-remove archives the PR-SOURCES.yaml-mapped folder file to _archived/
command:
mkdir -p tree/finance-industry && printf "source:
  id: stripe-node
  authoritative_publisher: Stripe
  authoritative_url: https://github.com/stripe/stripe-node
  registry_link: PR-SOURCES.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
" > tree/finance-industry/stripe-node.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" --id stripe-node --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f tree/finance-industry/_archived/stripe-node.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
